summary: Spec review remains accepted for the bounded HARBOR-212 screenshot failure evidence semantics correction; PR #230 only retires the post-closeout current pointer.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The HARBOR-212 spec remains constrained to preventing fabricated screenshot refs/evidence when live screenshot capture returns a structured failure; PR #230 only retires current-pointer metadata.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The implementation contract excludes App/Core/Lode changes, #208/#210/#211/#218 closeout, real browser/profile/account/Cookie/production page actions, raw evidence export, and write actions.
